title: DNA isolation in bark beetles (Coleoptera: Curculionidae): reliability of extraction methods and application in downstream molecular procedures
author: Stazione, Leonel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deposit includes all data, scripts, and statistical outputs used in the analyses for the associated manuscript. It provides a fully reproducible workflow in R, including data preprocessing, modelling, diagnostics, figure generation and supplementary material.
steps_raw: This deposit includes all data, scripts, and statistical outputs used in the analyses for the associated manuscript. It provides a fully reproducible workflow in R, including data preprocessing, modelling, diagnostics, figure generation and supplementary material.
